title: Should I get the 10th Aniv Box Set
display_title: Should I get the 10th Aniv Box Set
wikitext:
[]: Should I get the 10th Aniv. Box Set?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Sep 20, 2006 4:21 pm Or should I wait for another box set?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Sep 20, 2006 4:41 pm I bought it and well nothing too spectacular

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Sep 20, 2006 5:12 pm If i was Paris Hilton, i'd probably buy it! But for now, i'll stick around with the upcoming Premium Collection!

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Sep 20, 2006 5:17 pm Do you mean you bought the Japanese 10th AE, or the American 10th AE? Because from what I can tell, ADV has pushed the American one back, yet again.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Sep 20, 2006 5:20 pm ADV one. well i got it like a week ago so i dunno. i got it from an underground site so ya know

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Wed Sep 20, 2006 5:21 pm the_seventh_child wrote: If i was Paris Hilton, i'd probably buy it! But for now, i'll stick around with the upcoming Premium Collection!

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Sep 20, 2006 5:29 pm So, I should wait for the prenium collection? What's that got?

[]: Re: Should I get the 10th Aniv. Box Set?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 20, 2006 7:10 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Or should I wait for another box set?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Sep 20, 2006 10:53 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: ADV one. well i got it like a week ago so i dunno. i got it from an underground site so ya know

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Sep 21, 2006 12:37 am Mundane wrote: the_seventh_child wrote: If i was Paris Hilton, i'd probably buy it! But for now, i'll stick around with the upcoming Premium Collection!

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Sep 21, 2006 10:20 am I'll wait for the HD-remaster.

[]: Re: Should I get the 10th Aniv. Box Set?             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Sep 21, 2006 1:47 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Or should I wait for another box set?

[]: Re: Should I get the 10th Aniv. Box Set?             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Sep 21, 2006 7:25 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Or should I wait for another box set?

[]: Re: Should I get the 10th Aniv. Box Set?             Quote Post by Karen_Leslie » Thu Sep 21, 2006 7:44 pm CorporalChaos wrote: Hexon.Arq wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Or should I wait for another box set?

[]: Re: Should I get the 10th Aniv. Box Set?             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Sep 21, 2006 7:46 pm Karen_Leslie wrote: CorporalChaos wrote: Hexon.Arq wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Or should I wait for another box set?

[]: Re: Should I get the 10th Aniv. Box Set?             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Sep 21, 2006 8:47 pm CorporalChaos wrote: Oh well, it works enough for me. Got it off Amazon, unfortunately.

[]: Re: Should I get the 10th Aniv. Box Set?             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Sep 21, 2006 9:37 pm drinian wrote: CorporalChaos wrote: Oh well, it works enough for me. Got it off Amazon, unfortunately.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Sep 21, 2006 11:27 pm I've gotten good results from Half.com and Amazon. You just need to read what they are saying. If it says entire series on 3 discs, and the series is 24-26 episodes, you're looking at a bootleg. If it says entire series on 2 discs, and it was a 13 or so ep series, you're looking at a bootleg. And generally, import means "imported from Chinese bootleggers." Buying Manga off of Half.com though can be a real bitch sometimes, because they like to count later volumes as "later editions"

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Sep 22, 2006 4:28 pm This is getting far off topic, but I'll say that I buy anime from DiscountAnimeDVD.com whenever what I'm looking for is available there. When it's not, I usually buy from RightStuf, who seem to have lower prices than AnimeNation on certain things. When the two cut even, I go with AnimeNation.

[]:             Quote Post by friedrice » Sat Sep 23, 2006 7:29 pm I don't have any boxsets yet, but I think I'll wait for the Blu-ray or HD-dvd releases... ADV will eventually release them. Imagine an High Definition remaster of all 26 eps in one Blu-ray disc!!
summary:
[]: Should I get the 10th Aniv. Box Set?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Sep 20, 2006 4:21 pm Or should I wait for another box set?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Sep 20, 2006 4:41 pm I bought it and well nothing too spectacular

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Sep 20, 200
